footer.tagline: The fullstack mobile framework. Build once, deploy everywhere.

hero.subtitle: Synkos is a Vue + Capacitor + Node framework with auth, theming, i18n, native gestures and a polished UI library — all wired up. Just write your features.

features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
features.subtitle: An opinionated framework that gets out of your way.

mobile.title: Mobile-first, web-ready
mobile.desc: iOS, Android and PWA from a single Vue 3 codebase. Native feel, web ergonomics.

auth.title: Auth, batteries included
auth.desc: Email + OTP, social login, biometric unlock, account management. All wired up, all editable.

theme.title: Themable down to the bone
theme.desc: CSS custom properties, SCSS tokens, platform-aware tokens. Dark and light, your brand.

i18n.title: i18n by default
i18n.desc: vue-i18n with auto-merge of framework strings. Reach every market from day one.

native.title: Native, when you need it
native.desc: Capacitor plugins curated and pre-configured. Push, biometric, camera, splash, haptics.

dx.title: DX you'll love
dx.desc: Live reload, typed router, headless stores, and a CLI that actually helps.

code.title: Configure once, build forever
code.subtitle: An app config file, a router, and your pages. That's the contract.

cta.title: Ready to build?
cta.subtitle: One command. Your project, scaffolded with everything wired up.

docs.notFound: This page is missing or has been moved.
docs.englishOnly: Note: this section is only available in English. The conceptual guides are translated.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Releases, deep-dives and updates from the Synkos team.

error.notFoundMessage: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
